goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'mutliple sports' and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of college'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
The restaurant should serve 'chinese' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'attraction' by '11:30'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of mutliple sports and should be in the centre
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of college
Make sure you get address and phone number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the same area as the attraction
The restaurant should serve chinese food
Make sure you get phone number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the attraction by 11:30
Make sure you get contact number and car type
